name: Sous Proven'cal
recipeIngredient: Sour cream or plain yogurt - 1 1/2 cup
recipeInstructions:
Note: French's yellow mustard will work in this recipe very well.
Mix egg yolks, mustard, vinegar, and salt together in a bowl. Beat in olive oil drop-by-drop until a thick mayonnaise forms. Add more oil if needed. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry, then fold into yolk mixture. Stir sour cream/yogurt thoroughly. Cover and refrigerate for 2-4 hours.
